channel.title: Natural Materials and Biomimetics for Sustainable Engineering
channel.description: Recent content on Natural Materials and Biomimetics for Sustainable Engineering

item.title: Organisers
item.description:
Organising Committee

This workshop is organised Dr Gustavo Quino from Imperial College London and Dr Carlos Fuentes from Luxembrourg Institute of Science and Technology.

Organisers

Dr Gustavo Quino

Assistant Professor in Structural Analysis and Materials
Imperial College London

Dr Gustavo Quino is an Assistant Professor in Structural Analysis and Materials at Imperial College London. He obtained a first-class degree in Mechanical Engineering from Universidad Nacional de Ingeniería, followed by a master’s degree from King Abdullah University of Science and Technology. He later completed a DPhil in Engineering Science at the University of Oxford, where his doctoral research focused on the effects of harsh environments and dynamic loads on the mechanical performance of fibre composites.

item.title: Registration
item.description:
Register for the Workshop

The workshop is open to researchers, academics, industry professionals, and students with an interest in natural materials and biomimetic engineering.

📋 Registration Details

Date: Wednesday, 17 June 2026

Location: Imperial College London, South Kensington Campus, Exhibition Road, London SW7 2AZ

Attendance Options

In-Person

Join us on campus at Imperial College London for the full workshop experience, including talks, discussions, and networking with fellow researchers. Refreshments will be provided, but capacity is limited. You will require cofirmation of registration to attend in-person.

item.title: Speakers
item.description:
Invited Speakers

We are delighted to welcome a distinguished group of researchers and practitioners from across Europe whose work spans natural materials, biomimetics, and sustainable engineering.

Confirmed Speakers

  • Aart Willem van Vuure — KU Leuven
  • Alain Bermaud — Université de Bretagne Sud
  • Clare Garing — KU Leuven
  • Lina Osorio — Universidad Autonoma de Manizales
  • Carlos Cardona — LIST
  • Karthik Ram Ramakrishnan — University of Bristol
  • Koon-Yang Lee — Imperial College London
  • Sander Van de Vel — KU Leuven
  • Alexandros Prapavesis — KU Leuven
  • Jaime Buitrago — LIST
  • Emiliano Bilotti — Imperial College London
  • Ivo Liepa — Delft University of Technology

Interested in Attending?

If you work in natural materials, biomimetics, or sustainable engineering and would like to attend, we encourage you to get in touch with the organisers.
